---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
Please describe your use case for this feature. How would it improve your workflow or solve a problem you're facing?

## Detailed Description
Provide a detailed description of the proposed feature:

### Expected Behavior
Describe how the feature should work from a user's perspective.

### API Changes
If this feature requires API changes, please describe them here:

```python
# Example API usage
```

### Configuration
If this feature requires new configuration options, please describe them:

```python
# Example configuration
```

## Implementation Suggestions
If you have suggestions on how this feature could be implemented, please describe them here:

### Technical Approach
Describe the technical approach you would recommend.

### Dependencies
Are there any new dependencies required? If so, please list them.

### Breaking Changes
Will this feature introduce any breaking changes? If so, please describe them and how they can be mitigated.

## Security Considerations
Are there any security implications to this feature? How can they be addressed?

## Performance Impact
What is the expected performance impact of this feature? Are there any optimization considerations?

## Testing Strategy
How should this feature be tested? What test cases should be included?

## Documentation Requirements
What documentation updates are required for this feature?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Similar Features
Are there similar features in other tools or libraries that we could learn from? Please provide references.

## Priority
How would you prioritize this feature? (Low, Medium, High, Critical)

## Willingness to Contribute
Would you be willing to submit a pull request for this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this feature
- [ ] Yes, I can help with testing
- [ ] Yes, I can help with documentation
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting the feature

## Checklist
Please verify that you have completed the following:

- [ ] I have searched the existing issues and feature requests to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided a clear problem statement
- [ ] I have described the proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered alternatives
- [ ] I have described my use case
- [ ] I have considered security implications
- [ ] I have considered performance impact
